column1: # This file is an inventory snapshot only.
# Use agents/skills.txt for reinstalling shared skills into ~/.agents/skills.
#   shared   - symlinked from the shared ~/.agents/skills pool
#   local    - agent-specific local directory under ~/.claude/skills or ~/.codex/skills
#   external - symlinked from another checkout, currently gstack-managed skills
#   system   - bundled Codex system skill under ~/.codex/skills/.system
